songs.title: Sugar We're Goin Down
feed: “Sugar We're Goin Down” by Fall Out Boy returns to #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for a 5th nonconsecutive week at the top.

songs.title: Nice Guys Finish Last
feed: “Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 33 sales units.

“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 174,041 total units.
